holdings.infoBox: ESIM is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.11%, SK Hynix Inc DR at 5.46%, ASML Holding at 2.52%, Murata Manufacturing at 2.45%, and Grupo Financiero Banorte at 2.27%.

overview.description: The Eventide International ETF (ESIM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in companies outside of the US, without limitation on capitalization. Selection relies on proprietary value-based screening and fundamental research ESIM was launched on Dec 17, 2025 and is issued by Eventide.
